## Context

At-least-once writes (AD-003) pushed de-duplication downstream and was error-prone.

## Decision

Require an idempotency key on every write endpoint.

## Alternatives

- Downstream de-duplication only (AD-003, now superseded).

## Consequences

- Clients must generate and send stable idempotency keys.

## Reconciliation

Implemented as designed; supersedes AD-003. Evidence: diff 99cc22; verify passed.
